description_long: This is a modern, long-distance coach bus with a streamlined, rectangular body and a predominantly white exterior accented by a bold yellow and black geometric stripe along the sides. The bus features large, tinted rectangular windows arranged in a row, providing ample visibility for passengers. The front of the bus is characterized by a wide, dark windshield and subtle headlight details, while the rear is more minimal, with small taillights and ventilation grilles. The bus rides on two large black wheels on each side, and the side panels are smooth with minimal ornamentation. The roof is flat with a slight raised section toward the rear, likely for ventilation or air conditioning. The overall design suggests a focus on comfort and efficiency for urban or intercity travel.
description: A sleek, white coach bus with large tinted windows, bold yellow and black side stripes, and a streamlined, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bus, large tinted windows, and a prominent yellow and black stripe.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, dark windshield and subtle headlight details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the window and stripe pattern seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying small taillights, a flat back panel, and a raised roof section.
attribute_window_arrangement: A single row of large, evenly spaced rectangular windows runs along each side, separated by narrow vertical pillars; all windows are similar in size and shape.
